title: NS Independence Proof Attempt v2

analysis.object: T530: NS Independence Proof Attempt v2 depth analysis

forcing_analogy.description: NS regularity may be independent of ZFC; forcing construction analogous to CH
forcing_analogy.reason: If independent, NS is permanently EML-inf from any axiom system

ns_self_reference.description: Proving NS regularity within NS requires NS to prove something about its own solutions
ns_self_reference.reason: Self-reference forces EML-inf; parallel to Gödel sentence

conditional_independence.description: Conditional: if EML-3 proof methods are complete for ZFC, then NS is independent
conditional_independence.reason: Independence requires showing no EML-3 technique suffices

analysis.theorem: T530: NS Independence Proof Attempt v2 (S809).

key_theorem: T530: NS Independence Proof Attempt v2 (S809).
